Interface DocumentState

All Superinterfaces:
Settings
public interface DocumentState extends Settings
This interface is used to save custom script settings inside Bitwig Studio documents. The settings are shown to the user in the `Studio IO` panel of Bitwig Studio.
Since:
API version 1

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface Settings

    getBooleanSetting, getBooleanSettingForValue, getColorSetting, getColorSettingForValue, getEnumSetting, getEnumSetting, getEnumSettingForValue, getNumberSetting, getSignalSetting, getStringSetting
